title: Splendid Festival (Teatre Principal de Maó)
description: Summer programme at the Teatre Principal de Maó combining flamenco, singer-songwriter music, dance and family shows between 2 July and 27 August 2026. It opens on 2 July with María Terremoto's 'Manifiesto' and also features Compañía Marco Flores (16 Jul) and Maria del Mar Bonet with 'L'aigua no cansa' (30 Jul). Programme subject to official confirmation.
